title: HTI 1423627,00 Kinderwagen/Peppa Pig Stroller Wiro Scrapbook 40sheet 25cm, Multicolor
features: BABY ROLE PLAY - Kids will love pushing their small babies in the official Peppa Pig stroller. Very simple to setup, small children can safely place their dolls in the pram and easily push them along with them wherever they go.

GREAT FEATURES - The HTI Peppa Pig stroller pushchair is a single buggy with double wheels and features umbrella fold for compact storage. Suitable for dolls up to 40cm and had a handle height of 58cm.

EASY TO USE - The pram's double wheels are extremely easy to steer for small children and the pushchair features an easy fold mechanism for easy storage. With official Peppa Pig artwork, the classic pink and purple pushchair will delight both boys and girls and provide tons of fun for many years to come.
PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS: Contains 1x Peppa Pig Stroller. Does not require batteries. Not suitable for children under 3 years. Doll not included.

CE MARKED UK SELLER SAFE TO PLAY. It's made from safe, non-toxic ingredients. All our products are tested to the highest UK CE standard to ensure the safety of your children; please be careful when comparing with others.
description: Product Description HTI 1423627,00 Kinderwagen/Peppa Pig Stroller Pushchair Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources.
